title: Implement reservation ledger and atomic transactions
summary: Implement the authoritative reservation ledger for entities, cells, item quantities, interaction spots and capacity with all-or-nothing transactions and explicit release.
acceptance: Multi-target reservations are acquired atomically or leave no partial state
Reservation records include owner, job id, channel, amount, created tick and lease expiry for recovery only
Destroy, cancel and interruption paths explicitly release or clean affected reservations
Property and fuzz tests cover contention, capacity, stale entity handles and save round trip

history.details: Implemented ReservationLedger atomic transactions, lifecycle cleanup, snapshot round trip, reservations tests and benchmark; required checks pass. Beacon fallback implemented after simulation-engineer subagents stalled; independent reviewer required.

changes_requested: Medium: ReservationLedger restore is not fail-closed. restoreFromSnapshot clears current state before validating snapshot records and never rejects unsupported snapshotVersion; an unsupported version restores successfully and an invalid restore leaves the existing ledger empty. Required checks pass, but snapshot/restore safety acceptance needs a fix.

Addressed reviewer restore safety finding: restoreFromSnapshot now rejects unsupported versions, validates snapshot shape and records via scratch ledger before mutating, and has regression tests proving invalid restores preserve existing claims. Required checks rerun and pass.

review.summary: Medium: ReservationLedger restore is not fail-closed. restoreFromSnapshot clears current state before validating snapshot records and never rejects unsupported snapshotVersion; an unsupported version restores successfully and an invalid restore leaves the existing ledger empty. Required checks pass, but snapshot/restore safety acceptance needs a fix.
